author: doll-agent
content: Add chi2_contingency on Array<T, Ix2>. Computes statistic + expected table from row/col sums; p-value via regularised upper incomplete gamma Q(df/2, x/2). gamma_q split: series for x<a+1, Lentz CF for x>=a+1. Reuses existing Lanczos ln_gamma. Returns Chi2ContingencyResult with statistic/p_value/dof/expected. 6 tests cover independent-table (p=1), strong-diagonal (p tiny), known 2x3 expected value, zero-row + empty errors, gamma_q closed-form values.
